name: Guangdong Hec Technologyholding Co., Ltd
summary: Guangdong Hec Technologyholding Co., Ltd produces and sells aluminum products in China. The company offers chemical, hydrophilic, and electronic foils; capacitors; magnetic materials; electrochemical products; refrigerants; and chemical products, such as caustic soda, aluminum strips, PS sheets, etc., as well as brazing foils. The company was formerly known as Guangdong Dongyangguang Aluminum Co., Ltd. Guangdong Hec Technologyholding Co., Ltd was founded in 1993 and is based in Dongguan, China.
